name: Key-Value Store
description: A verified key-value register store exposed as a SERVICE CELL (cells-as-service-objects). A single cell holds a register file: slot 0 is a monotone store version, slots 1..=15 are key-addressed value registers. The published typed InterfaceDescriptor exposes put/delete (Replayable, Signature-gated) and get (Serviced — the named OFE read seam), driven through the invoke() front door — no Effect::Invoke, no kernel change. The store version is Monotonic, so a replayed or reordered mutation is an executor refusal.

deos.mount: register_deos (src/deos.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; DeosApp::mount yields the axum router
deos.publish: Signature (the store cell is a dregg:// sturdyref an indexer on another federation reacquires to read the live version)

affordances.view: cap-only, Signature (a READER reads the live store version) — EmitEvent kvstore-read
affordances.put: cap-only, Either (a WRITER writes a register) — the fire submits the FULL two-effect turn (bump VERSION + SetField(reg, value)), the executor re-enforcing Monotonic(VERSION)
affordances.delete: cap-only, Either (a WRITER clears a register) — the fire submits the FULL two-effect turn (bump VERSION + SetField(reg, 0)), the executor re-enforcing Monotonic(VERSION)

deos.seam: The fire runs against the seeded store cell carrying store_program() (Monotonic(VERSION)), so a rollback/replay that would lower the store version BITES in the deos fire path (src/deos.rs::tests).

methods.put: Replayable, Signature, args (reg, value) — desugars to bump VERSION + SetField(reg, value)
methods.delete: Replayable, Signature, args (reg) — desugars to bump VERSION + SetField(reg, 0)
methods.get: Serviced, None, args (reg) — the named OFE read seam, never desugared to a turn
